title: 01758_ODS_Test-Time_Adaptation_in_the_Presence_of_Open-World_Data_Shift
positive_examples: The proposed ODS framework can significantly improve test-time performance in machine learning applications, which can lead to better decision-making in critical areas such as healthcare and autonomous systems.

By effectively adapting to changing covariate and label distributions, the framework enhances the robustness of models in real-world applications, potentially improving outcomes in fields like computer vision and speech recognition.
